relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The promise of rest remains open.
Good news must be joined with trust.
Those trusting enter the rest prepared from foundation.
The seventh day remembers Divine rest.
The warning repeats: they shall not enter my rest.
Today is appointed again as invitation.
Joshua’s rest was not the final word.
A Sabbath-rest remains for Divine people.
Entering rest means resting as Divine rested.
Eagerness moves toward rest, not hardening.
The living word discerns soul, spirit, and heart-intention.
All is open before the One to whom account is given.
Jesus, great high priest, has passed through the heavens.
The high priest sympathizes with weakness, tested like us without misalignment.
Come boldly to the throne of grace for mercy and timely help.

contemplative_note: Hebrews 4 is the open gate of rest: Today still speaks, the word discerns, and the throne is grace for timely help.
